strategic_objective: Investigate the stability and origin of strong feature pair dependencies to distinguish inherent protocol patterns from dataset artifacts.
key_checks: Analyze dependency strength consistency across temporal partitions or dataset segments
Examine whether strong correlations align with known protocol behaviors or preprocessing steps
Assess if dependency concentration clusters remain stable or shift with data partitioning
Evaluate potential confounding effects of redundancy on observed feature pair dependencies
success_criteria: Demonstrated stability or variability of strong dependencies across temporal or partitioned views
Evidence clarifying whether dependencies reflect genuine protocol characteristics or artifacts
Identification of dependency pairs sensitive to redundancy or preprocessing
router_constraints: preserve feature pairs involved in strong dependencies
preserve temporal segmentation metadata if available
